name: Morocco
style_of_play: Organized defensive structure with rapid transitions and wide attacking play through technical wingers.
weaknesses: can sit too deep when protecting leads
tactical_summary: Defend in a compact 4-1-4-1 and break through Hakimi's runs and Ziyech's creativity; midfield anchor shields the back line during transitions.
why_it_matters: Morocco proved in 2022 they can compete with elite nations through organization and discipline — a template they carry into 2026.
